# flashblade_link_aggregation_group (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade link aggregation group (LAG) by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_link_aggregation_group" "example" {
  name = "lag1"
}

output "lag_speed" {
  value = data.flashblade_link_aggregation_group.example.lag_speed
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the LAG to look up (e.g. lag0).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the link aggregation group.
- `lag_speed` (Number) Aggregate speed of the LAG in bits per second (sum of port speeds).
- `mac_address` (String) MAC address of the LAG.
- `port_speed` (Number) Speed of each individual port in bits per second.
- `ports` (List of String) List of port names (e.g. eth0, eth1) in this LAG.
- `status` (String) Status of the LAG (e.g. healthy, degraded).
